tasks.title: Dashboard token breakdown — Feature detail view: click a feature to see per-task cost, phase breakdown (brainstorm/build/review), run duration. Cost column on feature timeline.
tasks.lastReason: Iteration escalation: same compound-gate layer recurred across multiple iterations

  ⚠ approval.json has no valid integrity signature (_integrity mismatch) — treating as corrupt to prevent gate bypass.
▶ createApprovalIssue
  ✔ writes approval.json with issueNumber and pending status when issue creation succeeds (3.388458ms)
  ✔ returns null and does not write approval.json when createIssue fails (0.888458ms)
  ✔ still writes approval.json when addToProject returns null (board warning only) (0.927375ms)
  ✔ skips project board calls when projectNumber is null (0.406917ms)
  ✔ reads SPEC.md content and passes it to createIssue as the body (0.385292ms)
  ✔ passes 'awaiting-approval' label to createIssue (1.138917ms)
  ✔ calls setProjectItemStatus with 'pending-approval' status when addToProject succeeds (0.389625ms)
✔ createApprovalIssue (8.570833ms)
▶ readApprovalState
  ✔ returns null when approval.json does not exist (0.171ms)
  ✔ returns parsed object when approval.json is valid JSON with correct signature (0.256958ms)
  ✔ returns { corrupt: true } when approval.json is valid JSON but missing _integrity signature (0.450041ms)
  ✔ returns { corrupt: true } when approval.json contains invalid JSON (0.247084ms)
  ✔ corrupt state does not expose issueNumber (so outer loop skips create branch) (1.351667ms)
✔ readApprovalState (2.758542ms)
▶ waitForApproval
  ✔ prints issue URL before pausing when getIssueUrl returns a URL (0.936792ms)
  ✔ prints 'Waiting for approval (issue #N)...' before pausing (0.503917ms)
  ✔ returns 'approved' when getProjectItemStatus returns 'Ready' on first poll (713.307875ms)
  ✔ returns 'interrupted' immediately when getStoppingFn returns true before first poll (757.335625ms)
  ✔ polls multiple times before returning 'approved' (708.597458ms)
  ✔ returns 'interrupted' after sleep when stopping flag becomes true (711.480667ms)
  ✔ uses APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL env var as sleep interval (0.195834ms)
  ✔ defaults to 30000ms sleep when APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL is not set (0.129833ms)
  ✔ uses 30000ms default when APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL is invalid (0.134208ms)
  ✔ prints elaps
